description: A dark-navy infographic from the Department of Labor. The top third is a photograph of President Trump in a dark suit and light-blue tie speaking into a microphone, with a blurred American flag behind him. Below, white text reads 'One Year of' (italic serif) over a large bold all-caps 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST!', followed by an italic subhead in a small box: 'President Trump has delivered:'. Beneath are two columns of items, each preceded by a checked checkbox, in white serif caps. Left column: NO TAX ON TIPS; SOCIAL SECURITY TAX CUTS; NO TAX ON OVERTIME; $259 MILLION IN BACK-WAGES RECOVERED; PELL GRANTS FOR SKILLED TRADES; LOWER COMPLIANCE COSTS FOR BUSINESSES; PROTECTION OF AMERICAN JOBS. Right column: 200 H-1B FRAUD AND ABUSE INVESTIGATIONS; AMERICAN JOB GAINS; 2,644 NEW APPRENTICESHIP PROGRAMS; FINANCIAL FREEDOM IN 401(K) INVESTMENTS; COMMITMENT TO 'MADE IN AMERICA'; HISTORIC FAIR TRADE DEALS; REDUCED REGULATIONS ON SMALL BUSINESSES. A small DOL seal sits at the bottom.
notable_text: One Year of AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST!; President Trump has delivered:; 200 H-1B FRAUD AND ABUSE INVESTIGATIONS; $259 MILLION IN BACK-WAGES RECOVERED; 2,644 NEW APPRENTICESHIP PROGRAMS
